# errorDescription

**Instance Property**

A brief description of the error.

## Declaration

```swift
var errorDescription: String? { get }
```

## Discussion

This appears in the title of an alert.

## Providing error information

- **description**: A localized description of the error.
- **failureReason**: A detailed description of the error.
- **recoveryOptions**: A set of possible recovery options to present.
- **recoverySuggestion**: A suggestion for recovering from the error.
- **localizedStringResource**: A set of localized error strings.
